title: Snapshot Pack
description: A simple modpack designed to bring optimization and QoL for every snapshot, usually updating the same day as a new snapshot.
body:
![Logo Of The Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5df94bc5c2f53d527f1163677fa10dda912c9ab_0.webp)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55de73718dfe478e87965cd348557330d70c6e04_0.webp)
---
Snapshot pack is a modpack cointaining **client-side only** mods to add **performance** and **quality of life** to every minecraft snapshot. Its small as it only uses mods that have shown to update every snapshot, but hopefully the pack will grow in the future.

![Update Notice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb749e18fcf47bda3cce03336a990a8d14e58b4_0.webp)
---
The pack will get **as soon as a new snapshot comes out**, maybe a couple hours after at most (very rarely even a day, usually on the first snapshot of the new drop).

This means that the latest version of the pack will display the **wrong** version, this is cause modrinth's API only updates a couple of days later. But don't worry, **EVERY** update lines up with a new snapshot, so just keep the latest version and you won't be left behind.
